params.name: Cluckavator
params.description: A fusion of Rebel engineering and Cybervendorian tech, this battle-ready robo-rooster is more than just a mining tool. Beak-Blade Drill. Nano-Coated Feathers.100% Cluck-Powered – No batteries required.
